rollbackCommands.title: Rollback Steps 1

rollbackCommands.command: Create a reviewed revert commit for validation route files if the route breaks production.

rollbackCommands.title: Rollback Steps 3
rollbackCommands.command: Revert tracking event whitelist changes only if they break build or analytics runtime.

rollbackCommands.command: Redeploy the previous known-good build from the server deployment system.

rollbackCommands.title: Rollback Steps 5
rollbackCommands.command: Keep reports/ebos deployment, validation, weekly, and monthly artifacts for 2026-07-03.

rollbackCommands.title: Rollback Steps 6
rollbackCommands.command: Do not delete reports/ebos during rollback; reports are audit evidence.

rollbackCommands.title: Rollback Steps 7
rollbackCommands.command: Do not run database reset or destructive Prisma commands for validation-page rollback.

executionSteps.title: 确认当前状态仍为 approved_not_executed
executionSteps.expectedOutcome: 状态显示 approvedByUser=true，且未记录 server/docker/nginx 命令执行。
executionSteps.failureHandling: 停止执行，先检查 status 文件，不准备任何生产执行动作。
mustNotDo: 不要声称生产部署已完成。

executionSteps.title: 运行本地预检查
executionSteps.command: npm run lint && npm run typecheck && npm run build
executionSteps.expectedOutcome: 在任何生产执行前，本地 lint、typecheck、build 通过。
executionSteps.failureHandling: 修复本地失败项，并重新生成 operator checklist 后再继续。
executionSteps.statusUpdateHint: 本地命令完成后，状态仍保持 approved_not_executed，最多只能进入 executing。
mustNotDo: 不要从 Codex 运行服务器命令。

executionSteps.title: 由用户确认服务器执行环境
executionSteps.expectedOutcome: 用户确认服务器项目路径，并理解 7 条命令仍需人工或明确授权执行。
executionSteps.failureHandling: 如果服务器路径或部署方式不清楚，停止并请求用户澄清。
executionSteps.statusUpdateHint: 真实命令执行前不改变状态。

executionSteps.title: 用户在服务器执行部署命令
executionSteps.expectedOutcome: 用户反馈具体服务器部署命令已完成，并提供不含 secret 的执行证据。
executionSteps.failureHandling: 任何命令失败时，记录 failed 状态并准备 scoped rollback。
executionSteps.statusUpdateHint: 服务器执行被用户确认后，状态可以进入 deployed_pending_verification。
mustNotDo: 不要让 Codex 自动 SSH。

executionSteps.title: 用户在服务器执行 Docker / Nginx 步骤
executionSteps.expectedOutcome: Docker stack 已刷新；如需 Nginx reload，也由用户确认完成。
executionSteps.failureHandling: 如果 Docker 或 Nginx 失败，停止并使用 scoped rollback 说明。
executionSteps.statusUpdateHint: 公共检查通过前，保持 deployed_pending_verification。
mustNotDo: 不要运行数据库 reset 命令。

executionSteps.title: 部署后运行 post-launch check
executionSteps.expectedOutcome: 仅在用户确认生产命令已执行后，公共 validation routes 检查通过。
executionSteps.failureHandling: 检查失败时，保持 deployed_pending_verification 或 failed，并启动 rollback review。
executionSteps.statusUpdateHint: 只有 post-launch check 通过后才允许 verified。
mustNotDo: 不要在真实部署前运行非 dry-run 的上线检查。
不要伪造 route 结果。

executionSteps.title: 按真实结果更新 deployment execution status
executionSteps.expectedOutcome: 状态只反映已观察到的命令执行与验证结果，且不含 secret。
executionSteps.failureHandling: 证据不完整时，不要把状态推进到 deployed_pending_verification 之后。
executionSteps.statusUpdateHint: verified 只能在 post-launch check passed 后写入。

executionSteps.title: 必要时执行 scoped rollback
executionSteps.expectedOutcome: 命令审计未发现危险命令、migration 命令或 secret 暴露阻断项。
executionSteps.failureHandling: 只使用限定范围 rollback，并保留 EBOS reports 作为审计证据。
executionSteps.statusUpdateHint: 如果发生 rollback，状态可以进入 rolled_back。

statusUpdateRules: approved_not_executed 只能表示已批准但尚未执行真实部署。
本地预检查完成后仍为 approved_not_executed 或 executing，不得写 deployed_pending_verification。
服务器部署命令完成且用户确认后，才允许写 deployed_pending_verification。
不能跳过 post-launch check 直接写 verified。
post-launch check 通过后才允许写 verified。
warnings: Do not write verified until post-launch check has passed.
Do not record server/docker/nginx commands unless the user confirms they were actually executed.

postCommandVerificationPlan: Confirm user-reported server command completion before running post-launch check.
Run npx tsx scripts/check-ebos-validation-post-launch.ts --date 2026-07-03 --site-url https://www.enhe-tech.com.cn only after deployment execution.
If post-launch check passes, status may move to verified.
If post-launch check fails, keep status deployed_pending_verification or failed and prepare scoped rollback.
warnings: Must be executed by the user in the server context or after explicit executable environment confirmation.
This checklist does not execute deployment commands.
Server, Docker, and Nginx commands remain manual_required.
nextActions: Ask the user whether to enter real production deployment execution.
Keep server/Docker/Nginx commands manual until explicit executable environment is confirmed.
